chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.559 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.2931/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.2932/2026 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 23.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Azfar Khan, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant does not press this protective bail application on the ground that applicant has gone to Peshawar and he will file fresh protective bail upon his return. Order accordingly. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
